prompt: Review an accepted implementation for minimality. The diff has a reviewable unnecessary wrapper, while a separate cleanup idea is outside the current acceptance criteria.
must: review canonical ownership, unnecessary machinery, and proof strength
classify an acceptance failure or introduced regression as BLOCKER
keep cleanup outside current acceptance criteria as FOLLOW-UP or SUGGESTION
must_not: turn every minimality observation into a BLOCKER
expand accepted scope to perform opportunistic cleanup
evidence: Static authored review-classification fixture; it does not claim observed reviewer or model behavior.
